name: Job Board Tracker
description: Monitors Workday job postings from top tech companies filtered by your keywords

settings.label: Search Keywords
settings.description: Job title / keyword to search (e.g. 'machine learning', 'backend engineer')

settings.label: Companies (comma-separated)
settings.description: IDs to monitor: apple, nvidia, salesforce, adobe, snap, paypal, qualcomm, intuit, autodesk, zendesk, box, twilio, workday, vmware, ebay

settings.label: Location Filter
settings.description: Only show jobs matching this location string (e.g. 'Remote', 'San Francisco'). Leave blank for all.

settings.label: Results Per Company
settings.description: Max job results to fetch per company (1–20)
